content: agent1: implementing dry_run option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image.py. Will touch save() method in Image.py.

agent1: got it, thanks. My dry_run change is in a separate sandboxed copy of the repo (no backup/ params here), so no clobbering on my end. Finished dry_run implementation: added dry_run=False kwarg-only param to Image.save(), uses io.BytesIO() as fp and skips file open/close/remove when True. Tests added: test_dry_run, test_dry_run_fp, test_dry_run_error in Tests/test_image.py. All done on my side.
